summary: Iteration 40: Tested admin dashboard visual improvements (CSS animations). All CSS animation classes verified working: admin-page-in (page transitions), stagger-in (stats entrance), stagger-fast (modules entrance), greeting-in (header animation), card-lift-enhanced (stat card hover), module-card (module hover), sidebar-nav-link (nav hover with left border indicator), appt-row (appointment row slide). Page transitions work on route changes. Mobile view tested with hamburger menu opening sidebar sheet correctly. Public site /sito regression check passed.
passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS ===
1. POST /api/auth/login - PASS: Returns access_token for admin@brunomelito.it
2. GET /api/health - PASS: Returns {status: alive}
=== DASHBOARD VISUAL IMPROVEMENTS (Desktop) ===
3. Dashboard page loads - PASS: data-testid='dashboard-page' found
4. admin-page-in class - PASS: Page transition animation present
5. stagger-in class - PASS: Stats grid staggered entrance animation
6. stagger-fast class - PASS: Modules grid fast staggered entrance
7. greeting-in class - PASS: Header greeting animation present
8. card-lift-enhanced class - PASS: Stat card hover effect present
9. module-card class - PASS: Module card hover effect present
10. sidebar-nav-link class - PASS: 21 sidebar nav links with enhanced hover
11. appt-row class - PASS: Appointment row slide animation present
12. Dashboard stats visible - PASS: All 5 stats (Appuntamenti Oggi, Clienti Totali, Incasso Mensile, Incasso Annuale, Prossimi 7 Giorni)
13. Module cards - PASS: 19 module cards found with module-card class
14. New Appointment button - PASS: data-testid='new-appointment-btn' found
=== SIDEBAR NAVIGATION & PAGE TRANSITIONS ===
15. Sidebar active state - PASS: nav-active class applied to current page link
16. Navigation to Planning - PASS: admin-page-in class present after navigation
17. Active state change - PASS: Active link changes from 'Dashboard' to 'Planning'
18. Navigation to Clients - PASS: admin-page-in class present on Clients page
19. Active state on Clients - PASS: 'Clienti' link shows active state
=== MOBILE VIEW ===
20. Mobile dashboard loads - PASS: data-testid='dashboard-page' found on mobile
21. Mobile menu button - PASS: data-testid='mobile-menu-btn' found
22. Hamburger menu opens - PASS: Sidebar sheet opens with all nav links
23. Mobile CSS classes - PASS: stagger-in, stagger-fast, module-card present
=== PUBLIC SITE REGRESSION ===
24. Public site /sito loads - PASS: data-testid='website-landing' found
25. Hero section - PASS: 'BRUNO MELITO HAIR' title visible
26. PRENOTA ORA button - PASS: data-testid='website-book-btn' found
27. No console errors - PASS: No error elements on page
critical_code_review_comments: CSS animations well-implemented in index.css (lines 208-312): adminPageIn, staggerFadeIn, sidebar-nav-link hover effects, module-card hover, card-lift-enhanced, appt-row slide
Layout.jsx correctly uses key={location.pathname} to trigger page re-render with admin-page-in animation on route changes

Dashboard.jsx properly applies animation classes: greeting-in on header, stagger-in on stats grid, stagger-fast on modules grid, card-lift-enhanced on stat cards, module-card on module buttons, appt-row on appointment rows
Minor accessibility warning in console: DialogContent missing DialogTitle for screen readers (Sheet component) - not blocking functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 verified all admin dashboard visual improvements. CSS animation classes working: 1) admin-page-in for page transitions (triggered by key={location.pathname}). 2) stagger-in for stats grid entrance. 3) stagger-fast for modules grid entrance. 4) greeting-in for header animation. 5) card-lift-enhanced for stat card hover. 6) module-card for module hover with scale+shadow. 7) sidebar-nav-link with left border indicator on hover/active. 8) appt-row for appointment row slide on hover. Mobile hamburger menu opens sidebar sheet correctly. Public site /sito working (regression check passed).

page_transition_animation.details: admin-page-in class applied on route changes via key={location.pathname}, fade-in with translateY animation

stats_staggered_entrance.details: stagger-in class on stats grid, children animate with 0.03s delay increments

modules_staggered_entrance.details: stagger-fast class on modules grid, faster animation with 0.02s delay increments

sidebar_nav_hover.details: sidebar-nav-link class with ::before pseudo-element for left border indicator, translateX on hover

card_hover_effects.details: card-lift-enhanced on stat cards, module-card on module buttons with scale+shadow on hover

appointment_row_slide.details: appt-row class with translateX(4px) and background color change on hover

greeting_animation.details: greeting-in class on header with translateX entrance animation

mobile_view.details: Hamburger menu opens sidebar sheet, all nav links visible, CSS animations present

public_site_regression.details: /sito loads correctly with hero, PRENOTA ORA button, no errors

console_errors.frontend: Minor accessibility warning: DialogContent missing DialogTitle (Sheet component) - not blocking
